name: Lost Home
short_description: Lost Home is a 2D adventure game with a platformer spirit. you'll play as an armadillo and a snake, who'll have to work together in order to find themselves a new home.
detailed_description:
Lost Home is a family friendly adventure game with a platformer spirit. It tells the story of an unlikely friendship of an armadillo and a snake. Using their unique abilities they’ll have to survive against environmental hazards and predators together in order to find a new home.

Inspired by classic 2D platformer games, Lost Home offers four differently themed worlds with their own enemies and unique boss fights, combined with surprisingly challenging gameplay.

Lost Home is best experienced with a controller.
